name: Frontier Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 of the 16-oz cans of pinto beans and drain one while leaving the other undrained.
2. Use small Poblano Chiles; follow Sowest 1 to roast and seed them. Chop into pieces once roasted.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Cook and stir onions and sausage together until sausage is cooked through.
5. Drain excess fat from the mixture.
6. Combine sausage, onion, tomato, and remaining ingredients in an ungreased 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake uncovered until hot and bubbly.
8. Serve.
